basics.name: Grecia V.
basics.label: Web Developer & Designer
basics.summary:
UI Designer & Web Developer with 5+ years of experience building high-performance websites and digital experiences.

Specialized in UI/UX Design, Frontend Development with Astro, WordPress and Shopify, and 3D asset integration with Blender.

Passionate about Game Development, interactive interfaces, and creative coding. Available for freelance projects worldwide. 🚀

work.name: Self Employed
work.summary: Working as a freelance web designer and frontend developer, building high-performance websites for clients across different industries and backgrounds, with a strong focus on user experience, scalability, and conversion optimization.
highlights: Built e-commerce platforms for clients in wellness, shapewear, food, and consulting niches using WordPress, Shopify, and Astro.
responsibilities: Designed and developed high-performance websites using WordPress, Shopify, Elementor, and Astro.
Created UI/UX designs in Figma for landing pages, dashboards, and e-commerce platforms.
Collaborated directly with clients from all over the world to translate their brand into effective digital experiences.
Managed full project lifecycle: from wireframing and design to deployment and optimization.
Implemented SEO best practices and performance optimization across all projects.
Integrated 3D assets created in Blender to enhance visual storytelling.
Built custom animations and interactions using GSAP for high-complexity projects.
achievements: Delivered a variety of e-commerce projects and non e-commerce websites: coaching, wellness, tech industries and more for international clients.
Built dual-mode (Dark/Light) WordPress platform with custom branding.
Created high-performance wellness sites with AstroJS achieving excellent performance scores.
Designed an inclusive EdTech dashboard with gamified UX for neurodivergent students.
Created 3D models and animations for branding, ads and a variety of projects

work.name: Global Consulting Factory
work.summary: Built a RESTful CRUD API as part of an internship, using a MEAN stack (MongoDB, Express, Angular, Node.js), focused on functional backend and frontend integration.
highlights: Developed a full MEAN stack CRUD application managing data creation, reading, updating, and deletion.
responsibilities: Designed and implemented a RESTful API using Node.js and Express.
Built the frontend interface using Angular and Bootstrap.
Managed and queried a MongoDB database for all CRUD operations.
Tested and validated API endpoints to ensure correct data flow between frontend and backend.
achievements: Successfully delivered a fully functional MEAN stack CRUD API as a first professional project.
Gained hands-on experience with RESTful API design patterns and database management.

work.name: Salud y Familia AC
work.summary: Designed and developed a website for medical consultations with online and in-person payment integration, appointment calendar scheduling, and social media design.
highlights: Built a medical consultation website with multi-method payment support (bank transfer, PayPal, and others) and calendar date selection.
responsibilities: Designed and developed the full website for a medical consultation platform.
Implemented multiple payment methods including bank transfer, PayPal, and others.
Set up appointment calendar functionality allowing patients to book available dates.
Designed social media promotional posts for the organization's online channels.
achievements: Delivered a complete web platform enabling patients to book and pay for consultations fully online.
Produced all social media assets, strengthening the organization's digital presence.

projects.name: Web Design & Development Portfolio
projects.description: Freelance web design and development portfolio featuring e-commerce and corporate websites built with WordPress, Shopify, and Astro. SEO-optimized and built from scratch without premade templates.
highlights: 🎯 Full e-commerce and corporate WordPress & Shopify websites
✨ Custom branding built from scratch, no premade templates
🚀 SEO optimized for performance and conversions

projects.name: 3D Modeling & Animation Portfolio
projects.description: Collection of 3D models and animations created in Blender for clients and personal projects, covering product visualization, character design, and motion graphics.
highlights: 🚀 Fluid 60fps and 30fps animations
🎨 Custom 3D models for diverse industries
🎬 Video editing and compositing included

projects.name: Digital Garden
projects.description: Personal blog and digital garden built with Astro, sharing knowledge, interests, and personal analysis with a retro and relaxed aesthetic.
highlights: 📝 Personal knowledge management system
🌿 Reflects personality with a retro and relaxed vibe
🚀 Fast static site with Astro

projects.name: STARMOON Vaporwave OS
projects.description: A retro operating system simulator with vaporwave aesthetic hosted on Nekoweb. Built with pure HTML, CSS and JS as part of the indie web and nekoweb community.
highlights: 🚀 Lightweight: pure HTML, CSS & JS
🎨 Custom vaporwave OS UI with mini-games
🌐 Part of the Nekoweb retro web community
👾 Blog about game dev integrated

projects.name: Retro Recipes Website
projects.description: A kawaii-style retro recipe website on Neocities built with pure HTML, CSS and JS, featuring a personal collection of healthy recipes with a unique and creative UI.
highlights: 🍜 Personal healthy recipe collection
🎨 Kawaii retro UI with unique components
🚀 Pure HTML, CSS & JS — no frameworks
🌐 Part of the Neocities old web community

projects.name: USD to VES Currency Converter
projects.description: Portable desktop application for converting USD to Venezuelan Bolivar (VES) and vice versa using the official Banco Central de Venezuela (BCV) real-time exchange rate. Built with Python and available as a Windows .exe — no installation required.
highlights: 💱 Real-time BCV official exchange rate
🖥️ Portable Windows app — no install needed
🔄 Bidirectional USD ↔ VES conversion
✨ Daily motivational quotes included

projects.name: Commission & Percentage Calculator
projects.description: Portable desktop application to quickly calculate commissions and percentages for freelancers and business use. Built with Python and CustomTkinter — runs without requiring Python installed. Shows equation, deducted value and final result instantly.
highlights: 💰 Fast commission and percentage calculation
🖥️ Portable Windows app — no Python required
🎨 Clean intuitive UI with CustomTkinter
📊 Shows full equation and final result

projects.name: BWM — Bulk Watermark Maker
projects.description: Python console tool for bulk text watermarking of images. Process entire folders at once with flexible positioning options — corners, center, or random. Supports JPG, PNG, BMP, GIF, WebP and more via Pillow. First Python project.
highlights: 🖼️ Bulk watermark entire image folders at once
📍 Flexible positioning: corners, center or random
💾 Save, edit and reuse watermark presets
🗂️ Wide format support via Pillow (JPG, PNG, WebP...)

projects.name: BWM GUI — Bulk Watermark Maker with Interface
projects.description: GUI version of the Bulk Watermark Maker (BWM) desktop tool. Built with Python and CustomTkinter, it adds a visual interface to the bulk image watermarking workflow, including adjustable font size and an intuitive drag-and-drop style experience.
highlights: 🖼️ Visual GUI for bulk image watermarking
🔡 Adjustable watermark font size
🎨 Clean desktop UI with CustomTkinter
📁 Batch process entire folders instantly
